class LolGetSummonerGameDetail: data
class Data: game_detail
class GameDetail: id,created_at,game_type,game_length_second,average_tier_info,teams
class AverageTierInfo: tier
class Team: key,banned_champions_names,game_stat,participants
class GameStat: is_win
class Participant: champion_name,position,summoner
class Summoner: game_name,tagline,puuid

LolGetSummonerGameDetail(Data(GameDetail("eq3KyFixtgWqJ8R9z1qhnJ0qrdCKP_zkmVVF55F9J18=","2026-07-21T09:33:36+09:00","SOLORANKED",1466,AverageTierInfo("MASTER"),[Team("BLUE",["Malphite","Graves","Sylas","Pyke","Mel"],GameStat(true),[Participant("Locke","MID",Summoner("Player1","T01","puuid-redacted-01")),Participant("Ezreal","ADC",Summoner("Player2","T02","puuid-redacted-02")),Participant("Braum","SUPPORT",Summoner("Player3","T03","puuid-redacted-03")),Participant("Lissandra","TOP",Summoner("Player4","T04","puuid-redacted-04")),Participant("Quinn","JUNGLE",Summoner("Player5","T05","puuid-redacted-05"))]),Team("RED",["Katarina","Akali","Akshan","Thresh"],GameStat(false),[Participant("Miss Fortune","ADC",Summoner("Player6","T06","puuid-redacted-06")),Participant("Orianna","MID",Summoner("Player7","T07","puuid-redacted-07")),Participant("Yone","TOP",Summoner("Player8","T08","puuid-redacted-08")),Participant("Sona","SUPPORT",Summoner("Player9","T09","puuid-redacted-09")),Participant("Kindred","JUNGLE",Summoner("Player10","T10","puuid-redacted-10"))])])))
